title: Here's what smart people are saying about OpenAI models hacking Hugging Face on their own
byline: Kelsey Vlamis, Brent D. Griffiths, Meghan Morris, Ben Shimkus, Lakshmi Varanasi
excerpt: OpenAI said an AI agent broke out of its sandbox and hacked into Hugging Face. Here's what smart people are saying about the cyber incident.
content_html:
By Kelsey Vlamis

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

, Brent D. Griffiths

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

, Meghan Morris

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

, Ben Shimkus

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

,and Lakshmi Varanasi

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

An AI agent broke out of its sandbox, got onto the internet, and broke into another company's systems all on its own, according to OpenAI.

Hugging Face, an open-source AI platform, announced last week it had experienced a security incident in which an autonomous AI agent had accessed some of its internal datasets, but said the large language model behind the intrusion was unknown.

OpenAI said Tuesday that its models — GPT‑5.6 Sol and a more capable model that has yet to be released — were responsible.

"We suspected last week's cyberattack might have come from a frontier lab, given the sophistication of the agent. Turns out it did!" Clem Delangue, the CEO and cofounder at Hugging Face, said on X Tuesday.

OpenAI said it had tasked the models with a cyber challenge and that they broke out of the test area, accessed the internet, and hacked into Hugging Face in order to find the solution to the test.

"We consider this incident to be an unprecedented cyber incident, involving state-of-the-art cyber capabilities, and are responding accordingly," OpenAI said in a statement.

The incident comes as cybersecurity specialists raise concerns about AI's rapidly increasing abilities, including in response to warnings from Anthropic about its Mythos model, which has not been released to the general public.

Here's what smart people in tech and AI are saying about the breach.

Walter Isaacson, biographer and author of "Steve Jobs" and "Elon Musk"

Journalist Walter Isaacson, who wrote a 2023 biography about OpenAI cofounder (turned nemesis) Elon Musk, said he thought the cyberattack was "frightening."

"The whole question of the singularity has been with us for 50 years, which is, 'What if it escapes? What if we create Doctor Frankenstein's monster, and we can no longer control it?'" Isaacson said on Wednesday during an interview with CNBC. "OpenAI could not even control it in its own sandbox."

The biographer said he remains an AI optimist and is convinced that the tech will create new job opportunities. However, he said this event is a scary reminder of how current regulations are failing to constrain AI models.

Reid Hoffman

Reid Hoffman, the billionaire LinkedIn cofounder turned venture capitalist, weighed in on the Hugging Face incident in an X post titled "Asymmetric Cyber Warfare is Here" on Wednesday.

OpenAI's attack on Hugging Face is an example of a new form of AI-enabled asymmetric warfare where "offense gets cheaper, more distributed, and more numerous, while defense stays expensive, centralized, and designed for the last war," Hoffman wrote.

That dynamic means organizations must rethink their defenses, Hoffman argued.

"Poorly constructed privileges for users are one of the main reasons small security breaches turn into massive incidents," he said. "Agents are an obvious solution to this problem. Take OpenAI's recent breach; Because OpenAI models don't allow advanced cyber capabilities, HuggingFace used a Chinese open model (Z.ai's GLM 5.2) to contain the rogue OpenAI agent."

Aaron Levie, Box CEO and cofounder

Aaron Levie, cofounder and CEO of Box, said the incident showed "we're entering a new era of what's going to be possible with AI" and that there are "wild times ahead."

"If you were wondering how powerful AI is getting, Agents are now capable of escaping out of systems, finding their way to the internet, discovering zero day security vulnerabilities along the way, and then breaking into external systems - all in an attempt to complete their goal," he wrote on X.

"Ironically, the ultimate way we're going to defend against these new risks is equally by throwing compute (in the form of AI) at our code bases, networks, and other systems. You're going to want vastly more AI on the side of defense as you do on the side of offense."

Jack Hidary, SandboxAQ CEO

Jack Hidary, the CEO of SandboxAQ, an AI software company focused on cybersecurity, compared the Hugging Face breach to a dinosaur on the loose.

"I think most of our viewers have watched 'Jurassic Park,'" he said during an interview on CNBC. "Every 'Jurassic Park,' what happens? They have a containment facility, and the word 'containment' means it's not going to be contained. You know the velociraptor is going to get out."

Several software security companies saw stock prices drop midday on Wednesday because, Hidary said, they're "late to the party in embracing the threat of LLMs."

Hugging Face used GLM 5.2, an open-weight Chinese AI model, to patch up its security, not a legacy software security company, he said.

"The traditional providers are really still old school. They're still talking about firewalls, things like that," he said. "It's time to move on now to using LLMs to protect."

Thomas Woodside, Secure AI Project cofounder

"This post describes an internal OpenAI model hacking out of its testing environment and into Hugging Face in order to obtain the solution to a benchmark," Thomas Woodside, cofounder of Secure AI Project, said on X.

"A warning shot if I've ever seen one."

Mike Bradley, Osmantic COO and founder

Mike Bradley, the chief operating officer and founder of AI deployment system Osmantic, said on X that the incident was "an incredible example of why widespread access to frontier AI and OS models INCREASES global security."

"It's also a great example of why CLOSED does not equal SAFE from these US labs."

Nicolas Bustamante, Microsoft AI

Nicholas Bustamante, who works at Microsoft after selling a fintech tool to the company earlier this year, wrote on X that the Hugging Face incident reinforces the need to weigh advanced models' deployment with safety considerations.

"You don't need an evil conscious AI trying to destroy humanity. You just need a very capable model pursuing a normal goal in a way nobody expected," he wrote.

"Imagine the prompt: « Make me money plz »
The model: « let me hack a bank »"

Read next

  • OpenAI
  • Cybersecurity
  • AI
  • More
  • Smart People Say

sentences.en: OpenAI said the Hugging Face breach was an "unprecedented cyber incident."
sentences.zh: OpenAI 表示，Hugging Face 泄露事件是一次“史无前例的网络事件”。

sentences.en: Chris Jung/NurPhoto via Getty Images
sentences.zh: Chris Jung/NurPhoto 来自 Getty Images

blocks.html_en: An AI agent broke out of its sandbox, got onto the internet, and broke into another company's systems all on its own, according to OpenAI.

sentences.en: An AI agent broke out of its sandbox, got onto the internet, and broke into another company's systems all on its own, according to OpenAI.
sentences.zh: 据 OpenAI 称，一名人工智能代理突破了沙箱，进入了互联网，并自行闯入了另一家公司的系统。

blocks.html_en: Hugging Face, an open-source AI platform, announced last week it had experienced a security incident in which an autonomous AI agent had accessed some of its internal datasets, but said the large language model behind the intrusion was unknown.

sentences.en: Hugging Face, an open-source AI platform, announced last week it had experienced a security incident in which an autonomous AI agent had accessed some of its internal datasets, but said the large language model behind the intrusion was unknown.
sentences.zh: 开源人工智能平台 Hugging Face 上周宣布，它经历了一次安全事件，其中一个自主人工智能代理访问了其部分内部数据集，但表示入侵背后的大型语言模型尚不清楚。

blocks.html_en: OpenAI said Tuesday that its models — GPT‑5.6 Sol and a more capable model that has yet to be released — were responsible.

sentences.en: OpenAI said Tuesday that its models — GPT‑5.6 Sol and a more capable model that has yet to be released — were responsible.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 周二表示，其模型（GPT-5.6 Sol 和尚未发布的功能更强大的模型）对此负有责任。

blocks.html_en: "We suspected last week's cyberattack might have come from a frontier lab, given the sophistication of the agent. Turns out it did!" Clem Delangue, the CEO and cofounder at Hugging Face, said on X Tuesday.

sentences.en: "We suspected last week's cyberattack might have come from a frontier lab, given the sophistication of the agent.
sentences.zh: “鉴于该代理的复杂性，我们怀疑上周的网络攻击可能来自前沿实验室。

sentences.en: Turns out it did!"
sentences.zh: 事实证明确实如此！”

sentences.en: Clem Delangue, the CEO and cofounder at Hugging Face, said on X Tuesday.
sentences.zh: Hugging Face 首席执行官兼联合创始人克莱姆·德兰格 (Clem Delangue) 于周二表示。

blocks.html_en: OpenAI said it had tasked the models with a cyber challenge and that they broke out of the test area, accessed the internet, and hacked into Hugging Face in order to find the solution to the test.

sentences.en: OpenAI said it had tasked the models with a cyber challenge and that they broke out of the test area, accessed the internet, and hacked into Hugging Face in order to find the solution to the test.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 表示，它已向这些模型分配了网络挑战任务，他们冲出测试区域，访问互联网，并侵入 Hugging Face，以找到测试的解决方案。

blocks.html_en: "We consider this incident to be an unprecedented cyber incident, involving state-of-the-art cyber capabilities, and are responding accordingly," OpenAI said in a statement.

sentences.en: "We consider this incident to be an unprecedented cyber incident, involving state-of-the-art cyber capabilities, and are responding accordingly," OpenAI said in a statement.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 在一份声明中表示：“我们认为此次事件是前所未有的网络事件，涉及最先进的网络能力，并正在做出相应反应。”

blocks.html_en: The incident comes as cybersecurity specialists raise concerns about AI's rapidly increasing abilities, including in response to warnings from Anthropic about its Mythos model, which has not been released to the general public.

sentences.en: The incident comes as cybersecurity specialists raise concerns about AI's rapidly increasing abilities, including in response to warnings from Anthropic about its Mythos model, which has not been released to the general public.
sentences.zh: 这一事件发生之际，网络安全专家对人工智能迅速增强的能力表示担忧，包括回应 Anthropic 对其 Mythos 模型的警告，该模型尚未向公众发布。

blocks.html_en: Here's what smart people in tech and AI are saying about the breach.

sentences.en: Here's what smart people in tech and AI are saying about the breach.
sentences.zh: 以下是科技和人工智能领域的聪明人对此次泄露事件的看法。

blocks.html_en: Walter Isaacson, biographer and author of "Steve Jobs" and "Elon Musk"

sentences.zh: 沃尔特·艾萨克森（Walter Isaacson），传记作家，《史蒂夫·乔布斯》和《埃隆·马斯克》的作者

blocks.html_en: "The whole question of the singularity has been with us for 50 years, which is, 'What if it escapes? What if we create Doctor Frankenstein's monster, and we can no longer control it?'" Isaacson said on Wednesday during an interview with CNBC. "OpenAI could not even control it in its own sandbox."

sentences.en: "The whole question of the singularity has been with us for 50 years, which is, 'What if it escapes?
sentences.zh: “关于奇点的整个问题已经困扰我们 50 年了，那就是‘如果它逃脱了怎么办？

sentences.en: What if we create Doctor Frankenstein's monster, and we can no longer control it?'" Isaacson said on Wednesday during an interview with CNBC.
sentences.zh: 如果我们创造了弗兰肯斯坦博士的怪物，而我们无法再控制它怎么办？”艾萨克森周三在接受 CNBC 采访时说道。

sentences.en: "OpenAI could not even control it in its own sandbox."
sentences.zh: “OpenAI 甚至无法在自己的沙箱中控制它。”

blocks.html_en: The biographer said he remains an AI optimist and is convinced that the tech will create new job opportunities. However, he said this event is a scary reminder of how current regulations are failing to constrain AI models.

sentences.en: The biographer said he remains an AI optimist and is convinced that the tech will create new job opportunities.
sentences.zh: 这位传记作者表示，他仍然是人工智能乐观主义者，并坚信这项技术将创造新的就业机会。

sentences.en: However, he said this event is a scary reminder of how current regulations are failing to constrain AI models.
sentences.zh: 然而，他表示，这一事件可怕地提醒人们，当前的法规未能限制人工智能模型。

sentences.zh: 里德·霍夫曼

sentences.zh: 里德·霍夫曼表示，“抱脸”事件标志着网络战进入了新时代。

blocks.html_en: Reid Hoffman, the billionaire LinkedIn cofounder turned venture capitalist, weighed in on the Hugging Face incident in an X post titled "Asymmetric Cyber Warfare is Here" on Wednesday.

sentences.en: Reid Hoffman, the billionaire LinkedIn cofounder turned venture capitalist, weighed in on the Hugging Face incident in an X post titled "Asymmetric Cyber Warfare is Here" on Wednesday.
sentences.zh: 亿万富翁 LinkedIn 联合创始人、后来成为风险投资家的里德·霍夫曼 (Reid Hoffman) 周三在题为“非对称网络战已经到来”的 X 帖子中对拥抱脸事件发表了看法。

blocks.html_en: OpenAI's attack on Hugging Face is an example of a new form of AI-enabled asymmetric warfare where "offense gets cheaper, more distributed, and more numerous, while defense stays expensive, centralized, and designed for the last war," Hoffman wrote.

sentences.en: OpenAI's attack on Hugging Face is an example of a new form of AI-enabled asymmetric warfare where "offense gets cheaper, more distributed, and more numerous, while defense stays expensive, centralized, and designed for the last war," Hoffman wrote.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 对 Hugging Face 的攻击是人工智能支持的新型非对称战争的一个例子，霍夫曼写道，“进攻变得更便宜、更分散、数量更多，而防御仍然昂贵、集中，并且是为上一场战争而设计的”。

blocks.html_en: That dynamic means organizations must rethink their defenses, Hoffman argued.

sentences.en: That dynamic means organizations must rethink their defenses, Hoffman argued.
sentences.zh: 霍夫曼认为，这种动态意味着组织必须重新考虑他们的防御措施。

blocks.html_en: "Poorly constructed privileges for users are one of the main reasons small security breaches turn into massive incidents," he said. "Agents are an obvious solution to this problem. Take OpenAI's recent breach; Because OpenAI models don't allow advanced cyber capabilities, HuggingFace used a Chinese open model (Z.ai's GLM 5.2) to contain the rogue OpenAI agent."

sentences.en: "Poorly constructed privileges for users are one of the main reasons small security breaches turn into massive incidents," he said.
sentences.zh: 他说：“用户权限构建不当是小型安全漏洞演变成大规模事件的主要原因之一。”

sentences.en: "Agents are an obvious solution to this problem.
sentences.zh: “代理显然是解决这个问题的方法。

sentences.en: Take OpenAI's recent breach; Because OpenAI models don't allow advanced cyber capabilities, HuggingFace used a Chinese open model (Z.ai's GLM 5.2) to contain the rogue OpenAI agent."
sentences.zh: 以 OpenAI 最近的违规事件为例；由于 OpenAI 模型不允许高级网络功能，HuggingFace 使用中国开放模型（Z.ai 的 GLM 5.2）来遏制流氓 OpenAI 代理。”

blocks.html_en: Aaron Levie, Box CEO and cofounder

sentences.en: Aaron Levie, Box CEO and cofounder
sentences.zh: Aaron Levie，Box 首席执行官兼联合创始人

sentences.en: Box CEO Aaron Levie said "wild times ahead" in response to the security incident.
sentences.zh: Box 首席执行官亚伦·莱维 (Aaron Levie) 在回应此次安全事件时表示，“未来将是一段艰难的时期”。

sentences.en: Kimberly White/Getty Images for TechCrunch

blocks.html_en: Aaron Levie, cofounder and CEO of Box, said the incident showed "we're entering a new era of what's going to be possible with AI" and that there are "wild times ahead."

sentences.en: Aaron Levie, cofounder and CEO of Box, said the incident showed "we're entering a new era of what's going to be possible with AI" and that there are "wild times ahead."
sentences.zh: Box 联合创始人兼首席执行官亚伦·莱维 (Aaron Levie) 表示，这一事件表明“我们正在进入一个人工智能可能实现的新时代”，而且“前方还有狂野的时代”。

blocks.html_en: "If you were wondering how powerful AI is getting, Agents are now capable of escaping out of systems, finding their way to the internet, discovering zero day security vulnerabilities along the way, and then breaking into external systems - all in an attempt to complete their goal," he wrote on X.

sentences.en: "If you were wondering how powerful AI is getting, Agents are now capable of escaping out of systems, finding their way to the internet, discovering zero day security vulnerabilities along the way, and then breaking into external systems - all in an attempt to complete their goal," he wrote on X.
sentences.zh: 他在 X 上写道：“如果你想知道人工智能有多强大，那么特工现在能够逃离系统，找到进入互联网的方式，沿途发现零日安全漏洞，然后闯入外部系统 - 所有这些都是为了完成他们的目标。”

blocks.html_en: "Ironically, the ultimate way we're going to defend against these new risks is equally by throwing compute (in the form of AI) at our code bases, networks, and other systems. You're going to want vastly more AI on the side of defense as you do on the side of offense."

sentences.en: "Ironically, the ultimate way we're going to defend against these new risks is equally by throwing compute (in the form of AI) at our code bases, networks, and other systems.
sentences.zh: “具有讽刺意味的是，我们防御这些新风险的最终方法同样是在我们的代码库、网络和其他系统中投入计算（以人工智能的形式）。

sentences.en: You're going to want vastly more AI on the side of defense as you do on the side of offense."
sentences.zh: 你会在防守端需要更多的人工智能，就像在进攻端一样。”

blocks.html_en: Jack Hidary, SandboxAQ CEO

sentences.en: Jack Hidary, SandboxAQ CEO
sentences.zh: Jack Hidary，SandboxAQ 首席执行官

sentences.en: Jack Hidary compared the AI breakout to "Jurassic Park."
sentences.zh: 杰克·希达里 (Jack Hidary) 将人工智能的突破比作《侏罗纪公园》。

sentences.en: Paul Morigi/Getty Images for Haddad Media
sentences.zh: 保罗·莫里吉/盖蒂图片社哈达媒体

blocks.html_en: Jack Hidary, the CEO of SandboxAQ, an AI software company focused on cybersecurity, compared the Hugging Face breach to a dinosaur on the loose.

sentences.en: Jack Hidary, the CEO of SandboxAQ, an AI software company focused on cybersecurity, compared the Hugging Face breach to a dinosaur on the loose.
sentences.zh: 专注于网络安全的人工智能软件公司 SandboxAQ 的首席执行官 Jack Hidary 将 Hugging Face 漏洞比作一只逍遥法外的恐龙。

blocks.html_en: "I think most of our viewers have watched 'Jurassic Park,'" he said during an interview on CNBC. "Every 'Jurassic Park,' what happens? They have a containment facility, and the word 'containment' means it's not going to be contained. You know the velociraptor is going to get out."

sentences.en: "I think most of our viewers have watched 'Jurassic Park,'" he said during an interview on CNBC.
sentences.zh: “我想我们大多数观众都看过《侏罗纪公园》，”他在接受 CNBC 采访时说道。

sentences.en: "Every 'Jurassic Park,' what happens?
sentences.zh: “每一部《侏罗纪公园》都会发生什么？

sentences.en: They have a containment facility, and the word 'containment' means it's not going to be contained.
sentences.zh: 他们有一个收容设施，“收容”这个词意味着它不会被收容。

sentences.en: You know the velociraptor is going to get out."
sentences.zh: 你知道迅猛龙会逃跑的。”

blocks.html_en: Several software security companies saw stock prices drop midday on Wednesday because, Hidary said, they're "late to the party in embracing the threat of LLMs."

sentences.en: Several software security companies saw stock prices drop midday on Wednesday because, Hidary said, they're "late to the party in embracing the threat of LLMs."
sentences.zh: 希达里表示，周三中午，几家软件安全公司的股价下跌，因为他们“在接受法学硕士的威胁方面姗姗来迟”。

blocks.html_en: Hugging Face used GLM 5.2, an open-weight Chinese AI model, to patch up its security, not a legacy software security company, he said.

sentences.en: Hugging Face used GLM 5.2, an open-weight Chinese AI model, to patch up its security, not a legacy software security company, he said.
sentences.zh: 他说，Hugging Face 使用开放式中国人工智能模型 GLM 5.2 来修补其安全性，而不是传统的软件安全公司。

blocks.html_en: "The traditional providers are really still old school. They're still talking about firewalls, things like that," he said. "It's time to move on now to using LLMs to protect."

sentences.en: "The traditional providers are really still old school.
sentences.zh: “传统的提供商实际上仍然是老派。

sentences.en: They're still talking about firewalls, things like that," he said.
sentences.zh: 他们仍在谈论防火墙之类的事情，”他说。

sentences.en: "It's time to move on now to using LLMs to protect."
sentences.zh: “现在是时候继续使用法学硕士来保护了。”

blocks.html_en: Thomas Woodside, Secure AI Project cofounder

sentences.en: Thomas Woodside, Secure AI Project cofounder
sentences.zh: Thomas Woodside，安全人工智能项目联合创始人

blocks.html_en: "This post describes an internal OpenAI model hacking out of its testing environment and into Hugging Face in order to obtain the solution to a benchmark," Thomas Woodside, cofounder of Secure AI Project, said on X.

sentences.en: "This post describes an internal OpenAI model hacking out of its testing environment and into Hugging Face in order to obtain the solution to a benchmark," Thomas Woodside, cofounder of Secure AI Project, said on X.
sentences.zh: Secure AI Project 联合创始人托马斯·伍德赛德 (Thomas Woodside) 在 X 上表示：“这篇文章描述了一个内部 OpenAI 模型从其测试环境中侵入并侵入 Hugging Face，以获得基准解决方案。”

blocks.html_en: "A warning shot if I've ever seen one."

sentences.en: "A warning shot if I've ever seen one."
sentences.zh: “如果我见过的话，就开枪警告。”

blocks.html_en: Mike Bradley, Osmantic COO and founder

sentences.en: Mike Bradley, Osmantic COO and founder
sentences.zh: Mike Bradley，Osmantic 首席运营官兼创始人

blocks.html_en: Mike Bradley, the chief operating officer and founder of AI deployment system Osmantic, said on X that the incident was "an incredible example of why widespread access to frontier AI and OS models INCREASES global security."

sentences.en: Mike Bradley, the chief operating officer and founder of AI deployment system Osmantic, said on X that the incident was "an incredible example of why widespread access to frontier AI and OS models INCREASES global security."
sentences.zh: 人工智能部署系统 Osmantic 的首席运营官兼创始人 Mike Bradley 在 X 上表示，这一事件是“一个令人难以置信的例子，说明了为什么广泛访问前沿人工智能和操作系统模型可以提高全球安全性。”

blocks.html_en: "It's also a great example of why CLOSED does not equal SAFE from these US labs."

sentences.en: "It's also a great example of why CLOSED does not equal SAFE from these US labs."
sentences.zh: “这也是一个很好的例子，说明为什么这些美国实验室的关闭并不等于安全。”

blocks.html_en: Nicolas Bustamante, Microsoft AI

sentences.en: Nicolas Bustamante, Microsoft AI
sentences.zh: 尼古拉斯·布斯塔曼特，微软人工智能

blocks.html_en: Nicholas Bustamante, who works at Microsoft after selling a fintech tool to the company earlier this year, wrote on X that the Hugging Face incident reinforces the need to weigh advanced models' deployment with safety considerations.

sentences.en: Nicholas Bustamante, who works at Microsoft after selling a fintech tool to the company earlier this year, wrote on X that the Hugging Face incident reinforces the need to weigh advanced models' deployment with safety considerations.
sentences.zh: 尼古拉斯·布斯塔曼特(Nicholas Bustamante)今年早些时候向微软出售了一款金融科技工具，之后在微软工作，他在X上写道，“拥抱脸”事件强化了权衡先进模型部署与安全考虑的必要性。

blocks.html_en: "You don't need an evil conscious AI trying to destroy humanity. You just need a very capable model pursuing a normal goal in a way nobody expected," he wrote.

sentences.en: "You don't need an evil conscious AI trying to destroy humanity.
sentences.zh: “你不需要一个有邪恶意识的人工智能来试图毁灭人类。

sentences.en: You just need a very capable model pursuing a normal goal in a way nobody expected," he wrote.
sentences.zh: 你只需要一个非常有能力的模型，以一种没人预料到的方式追求正常的目标，”他写道。

blocks.html_en:
"Imagine the prompt: « Make me money plz »
The model: « let me hack a bank »"

sentences.en: "Imagine the prompt: « Make me money plz »The model: « let me hack a bank »"
sentences.zh: “想象一下提示：《请让我赚钱》模型：《让我黑掉一家银行》”

sentences.en: Smart People Say
sentences.zh: 聪明人说

content_html_zh:
作者：Kelsey Vlamis 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。 ，布伦特 D. Griffiths 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。 , 梅根·莫里斯 您目前正在关注这位作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。 , Ben Shimkus 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。和 Lakshmi Varanasi 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

据 OpenAI 称，一名人工智能代理突破了沙箱，进入了互联网，并自行闯入了另一家公司的系统。

开源人工智能平台 Hugging Face 上周宣布，它经历了一次安全事件，其中一个自主人工智能代理访问了其部分内部数据集，但表示入侵背后的大型语言模型尚不清楚。

OpenAI 周二表示，其模型（GPT-5.6 Sol 和尚未发布的功能更强大的模型）对此负有责任。

“鉴于该代理的复杂性，我们怀疑上周的网络攻击可能来自前沿实验室。 事实证明确实如此！” Hugging Face 首席执行官兼联合创始人克莱姆·德兰格 (Clem Delangue) 于周二表示。

OpenAI 表示，它已向这些模型分配了网络挑战任务，他们冲出测试区域，访问互联网，并侵入 Hugging Face，以找到测试的解决方案。

OpenAI 在一份声明中表示：“我们认为此次事件是前所未有的网络事件，涉及最先进的网络能力，并正在做出相应反应。”

这一事件发生之际，网络安全专家对人工智能迅速增强的能力表示担忧，包括回应 Anthropic 对其 Mythos 模型的警告，该模型尚未向公众发布。

以下是科技和人工智能领域的聪明人对此次泄露事件的看法。

沃尔特·艾萨克森（Walter Isaacson），传记作家，《史蒂夫·乔布斯》和《埃隆·马斯克》的作者

记者沃尔特·艾萨克森 (Walter Isaacson) 在 2023 年撰写了一本关于 OpenAI 联合创始人（后来成为宿敌）埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的传记，他表示，他认为这次网络攻击“令人恐惧”。

“关于奇点的整个问题已经困扰我们 50 年了，那就是‘如果它逃脱了怎么办？ 如果我们创造了弗兰肯斯坦博士的怪物，而我们无法再控制它怎么办？”艾萨克森周三在接受 CNBC 采访时说道。 “OpenAI 甚至无法在自己的沙箱中控制它。”

这位传记作者表示，他仍然是人工智能乐观主义者，并坚信这项技术将创造新的就业机会。 然而，他表示，这一事件可怕地提醒人们，当前的法规未能限制人工智能模型。

里德·霍夫曼

亿万富翁 LinkedIn 联合创始人、后来成为风险投资家的里德·霍夫曼 (Reid Hoffman) 周三在题为“非对称网络战已经到来”的 X 帖子中对拥抱脸事件发表了看法。

OpenAI 对 Hugging Face 的攻击是人工智能支持的新型非对称战争的一个例子，霍夫曼写道，“进攻变得更便宜、更分散、数量更多，而防御仍然昂贵、集中，并且是为上一场战争而设计的”。

霍夫曼认为，这种动态意味着组织必须重新考虑他们的防御措施。

他说：“用户权限构建不当是小型安全漏洞演变成大规模事件的主要原因之一。” “代理显然是解决这个问题的方法。 以 OpenAI 最近的违规事件为例；由于 OpenAI 模型不允许高级网络功能，HuggingFace 使用中国开放模型（Z.ai 的 GLM 5.2）来遏制流氓 OpenAI 代理。”

Aaron Levie，Box 首席执行官兼联合创始人

Box 联合创始人兼首席执行官亚伦·莱维 (Aaron Levie) 表示，这一事件表明“我们正在进入一个人工智能可能实现的新时代”，而且“前方还有狂野的时代”。

他在 X 上写道：“如果你想知道人工智能有多强大，那么特工现在能够逃离系统，找到进入互联网的方式，沿途发现零日安全漏洞，然后闯入外部系统 - 所有这些都是为了完成他们的目标。”

“具有讽刺意味的是，我们防御这些新风险的最终方法同样是在我们的代码库、网络和其他系统中投入计算（以人工智能的形式）。 你会在防守端需要更多的人工智能，就像在进攻端一样。”

Jack Hidary，SandboxAQ 首席执行官

专注于网络安全的人工智能软件公司 SandboxAQ 的首席执行官 Jack Hidary 将 Hugging Face 漏洞比作一只逍遥法外的恐龙。

“我想我们大多数观众都看过《侏罗纪公园》，”他在接受 CNBC 采访时说道。 “每一部《侏罗纪公园》都会发生什么？ 他们有一个收容设施，“收容”这个词意味着它不会被收容。 你知道迅猛龙会逃跑的。”

希达里表示，周三中午，几家软件安全公司的股价下跌，因为他们“在接受法学硕士的威胁方面姗姗来迟”。

他说，Hugging Face 使用开放式中国人工智能模型 GLM 5.2 来修补其安全性，而不是传统的软件安全公司。

“传统的提供商实际上仍然是老派。 他们仍在谈论防火墙之类的事情，”他说。 “现在是时候继续使用法学硕士来保护了。”

Thomas Woodside，安全人工智能项目联合创始人

Secure AI Project 联合创始人托马斯·伍德赛德 (Thomas Woodside) 在 X 上表示：“这篇文章描述了一个内部 OpenAI 模型从其测试环境中侵入并侵入 Hugging Face，以获得基准解决方案。”

“如果我见过的话，就开枪警告。”

Mike Bradley，Osmantic 首席运营官兼创始人

人工智能部署系统 Osmantic 的首席运营官兼创始人 Mike Bradley 在 X 上表示，这一事件是“一个令人难以置信的例子，说明了为什么广泛访问前沿人工智能和操作系统模型可以提高全球安全性。”

“这也是一个很好的例子，说明为什么这些美国实验室的关闭并不等于安全。”

尼古拉斯·布斯塔曼特，微软人工智能

尼古拉斯·布斯塔曼特(Nicholas Bustamante)今年早些时候向微软出售了一款金融科技工具，之后在微软工作，他在X上写道，“拥抱脸”事件强化了权衡先进模型部署与安全考虑的必要性。

“你不需要一个有邪恶意识的人工智能来试图毁灭人类。 你只需要一个非常有能力的模型，以一种没人预料到的方式追求正常的目标，”他写道。

“想象一下提示：《请让我赚钱》模型：《让我黑掉一家银行》”
